signals.headline: I cannot provide a "breaking news" format response based on these search results
signals.raw:

signals.headline: South Korea Annual Inflation Holds at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Annual Inflation Holds at 2.2% in March 2026, Up Slightly from 2.0% but Below Forecasts | NO | MED confidence**
